title: Empty list when binding API response to collection list
symptom: The user sees an 'empty list' message when trying to bind API response data to a collection list in WeWeb.
applies_when: Binding API response to a collection list
Using an array of items from the API response
not_this_if: The API response is correctly formatted and contains data
root_cause: The user was binding to the first element of the array (items[0]) instead of the entire array (items). This results in an empty list because the collection list expects an array, not a single object.
fix_steps: Refresh the view to see the populated list
agent_instruction: Bind the collection list to 'items' instead of 'items[0]'.
